claim_boundary: BHSM v5.8 audits the primordial compact-state and global size modulus as possible absolute unit anchors. The current action selects dimensionless ratios M_BH/M_star=1/2 and R_BH/ell_star=2 but does not generate ell_star, M_star, particle masses, gauge couplings, CKM values, rare-B observables, or full BHSM completion.

effective_scale_action.S_eff_current: S_eff(L)=S_hat[sigma_scale=1/2] after factoring the arbitrary unit ell_star
effective_scale_action.infinite_size_runaway: flat direction rather than bounded finite minimum
effective_scale_action.stationary_points: all positive L are stationary in the normalized reduced model
effective_scale_action.why_no_anchor: Every serious candidate either rescales with L, is dimensionless topological data, or requires an unproved absolute action coefficient, boundary tension, action quantum, or spectral eigenvalue.
effective_scale_action.zero_size_branch_handled: L=0 is excluded as degenerate geometry, not selected

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: absolute gravitational/curvature coefficient or constraint normalization
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: a coefficient with absolute dimensions is required to compare this term to dimensionless sectors
classical four-dimensional gauge scaling is L-neutral after field normalization

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: Dirac operator action source and mass operator theorem
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: massless kinetic normalization does not select L

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: absolute kinetic coefficient if physical units are demanded
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: v5.7 fixes sigma_scale but not the physical length multiplying the normalized cell
alpha_scale=2 and beta_scale=8 fix M_BH/M_star, not M_star

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: boundary tension or absolute boundary action coefficient
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: a boundary area term can fix L only if its absolute coefficient is action-derived

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: collar density or transition-layer action source
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: rho_star is normalized; physical collar width remains L times rho_star
lambda_hat_n/L^2 is not an absolute energy without a fixed physical eigenvalue

scaling_terms.coefficient_requirement: chosen integration dimension and coefficient units
scaling_terms.reason_no_absolute_anchor: the measure tracks L but does not by itself create a stationary equation

spectral_topological_assessment.action_stationarity_reason: dS_eff/dL=0 is identically flat or depends on missing dimensionful coefficients
spectral_topological_assessment.regularity_reason: finite action, smooth turning surface, and zero canonical momentum are homogeneous constraints in the current normalized model
spectral_topological_assessment.spectrum_reason: lambda_n=lambda_hat_n/L^2 leaves L arbitrary without an absolute eigenvalue theorem
spectral_topological_assessment.topology_reason: topological charges and Hopf data are dimensionless

v5_9_pilot_wave_update.claim_boundary: pilot-wave guidance may describe expansion but does not generate ell_star, M_star, M_BH, or R_BH
v5_9_pilot_wave_update.scale_modulus_result: pilot-wave dynamics is scale-covariant; finite L0 is not selected
